column7: definition
Total units sold; one Sales row = one unit, so equals the sales row count.
Number of unique customers with at least one sale.
Number of unique products that recorded a sale.

column6: SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Units] * RELATED ( Product[Unit Price] ) )
column7: List-price (gross) sales: units x list Unit Price. No discounts/returns/tax.

column6: SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Units] * RELATED ( Product[Unit Cost] ) )
column7: Cost of goods: units x Unit Cost.
